nodes.name: 🔔 Webhook — Write Email Sequence
nodes.notes: Triggered by: WF11B (initial setup), WF03 (post-purchase), WF09A (new blog post), ManyChat webhook (lead magnet). Receives: sequence_type, product data, brand context.

values.content: You are an expert email copywriter specializing in digital product businesses. You write welcome sequences that build genuine relationships, not just sell. Your emails feel like messages from a real person — specific, warm, occasionally funny, never corporate. You understand that the welcome sequence is the most important emails you'll ever send — they set the relationship tone forever. Every email must have a clear single purpose. Respond in valid JSON only.

=Write a complete 6-email welcome sequence for: Brand: {{$json.brand_name}} Tagline: {{$json.brand_tagline}} Website: {{$json.brand_url}} Tone: {{$json.tone}} Forbidden phrases: {{$json.forbidden_phrases.join(', ')}} Lead magnet: {{$json.lead_magnet_name}} Lead magnet URL: {{$json.lead_magnet_url}} Sequence structure: - Email 1 (Day 0): Welcome + deliver lead magnet + set expectations - Email 2 (Day 2): Your story — why ClearStack exists, who you are - Email 3 (Day 4): Best free resource (tip or blog post) - Email 4 (Day 7): First product recommendation (soft sell) - Email 5 (Day 10): Social proof + what customers say - Email 6 (Day 14): Discount offer (10% off, 48-hour expiry) Rules: - Subject lines under 50 chars — curiosity or specificity, never clickbait - Preview text (preheader) complements subject, never repeats it - Email body: plain conversational English, short paragraphs (2-3 sentences max) - One clear CTA per email — never two - P.S. lines — use them, they get read - No unsubscribe handling needed (Brevo handles it automatically) - Sign off as: The ClearStack Team Respond ONLY with this JSON: { "sequence_name": "Welcome Series — ClearStack Studio", "emails": [ { "email_number": 1, "send_delay_days": 0, "send_delay_hours": 0, "purpose": "Welcome + lead magnet delivery", "subject": "Subject line under 50 chars", "preview_text": "Preheader text under 90 chars", "body_html": "Complete email HTML using only:

, , ,
,

    ,
  • . No tables, no complex layout. Mobile-first.", "body_text": "Plain text version of the email", "cta_text": "CTA button text", "cta_url": "CTA destination URL", "ps_line": "P.S. line text" } ] }

nodes.name: 🧠 llama3 — Write Welcome Series
nodes.notes: Writes 6-email welcome series. Temp 0.78 for warm, natural voice while staying structured. ~8-12 min on CPU VPS.

values.content: You are an expert email copywriter for digital product businesses. You write post-purchase sequences that delight customers, reduce refund requests, generate reviews, and drive repeat purchases. The best post-purchase emails feel like exceptional customer service, not marketing. Respond in valid JSON only.

nodes.name: 🧠 llama3 — Write Post-Purchase Series
nodes.notes: Product-specific post-purchase sequence. Triggered by WF03 after every sale — passes product_name, product_url, product_price.

values.content: You write short, punchy lead magnet delivery sequences. 3 emails that deliver value, build trust, and naturally lead to a paid product — without feeling like a funnel. Respond in valid JSON only.

nodes.name: 🧠 mistral — Write Lead Magnet Series
nodes.notes: Short 3-email freebie delivery sequence. Uses mistral for punchy, concise copy — better than llama3 for short-form emails.

values.content: You write weekly email newsletters for a productivity/digital products brand. Your newsletters are genuinely useful — readers look forward to them. Each newsletter has exactly 4 sections: one actionable tip, one product spotlight, one blog post link, one community win or insight. Total reading time: under 3 minutes. Never filler. Every line earns its place. Respond in valid JSON only.

=Write this week's newsletter for {{$json.brand_name}}.

Date: {{new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-US', {weekday:'long', month:'long', day:'numeric'})}}
Brand URL: {{$json.brand_url}}
Tone: {{$json.tone}}
Context: {{$json.product_name ? 'Featured product this week: ' + $json.product_name + ' — ' + $json.product_url : 'No specific product featured — focus on value content'}}

Newsletter structure:
1. SUBJECT LINE — specific, curiosity-driven, under 50 chars
2. GREETING — warm, personal, 1 sentence
3. TIP OF THE WEEK — one genuinely useful productivity tip (150 words max)
   Must be immediately actionable. Real and specific.
4. PRODUCT SPOTLIGHT — if product provided, feature it naturally (100 words)
   If no product: skip this section
5. FROM THE BLOG — tease a blog post with a compelling headline + 2-sentence summary
   Link: {{$json.brand_url}}/blog
6. COMMUNITY WIN — share a fictional-but-realistic customer success story (80 words)
   Makes readers feel they're part of something
7. SIGN OFF — warm, brief, human
8. P.S. — always a question that invites reply (builds deliverability)

Respond ONLY with this JSON:
{
  "newsletter_date": "date string",
  "subject": "subject line",
  "preview_text": "preheader",
  "body_html": "Full newsletter HTML",
  "body_text": "Plain text version",
  "tip_summary": "1-sentence tip summary for social sharing",
  "send_immediately": true
}

nodes.name: 🧠 llama3 — Write Weekly Newsletter
nodes.notes: Weekly newsletter writer. Called by WF11C every Thursday at 9 AM. Passes latest product from WF03 as featured spotlight. Higher temp (0.82) for fresh, varied content each week.

nodes.name: ⚙️ Parse + Build Branded Email HTML
nodes.notes: Parses llama3/mistral output, wraps each email in the ClearStack branded HTML template (navy header, gold accent bar, CTA button, footer with unsubscribe). Outputs Brevo-ready objects.

nodes.name: 🔌 Send to WF11B (Brevo Builder)
nodes.notes: Passes complete sequence data to WF11B which creates the automation in Brevo via API.

meta.description: WF11A: Email Sequence Writer. llama3/mistral writes all 4 sequence types (welcome 6-email, post-purchase 5-email, lead magnet 3-email, weekly newsletter). Wraps in branded HTML template. Passes to WF11B for Brevo API creation.
